data.body: 518(#8) real root cause: env-resolution fallback was gated behind ctags availability (CI has no ctags binary -> language gate abstained before importlib). #8 subagent restructured _refute_symbol to run env fallback on all ctags-blind paths; validated ctags-absent (REBAR_CTAGS_BIN=/nonexistent) 17 pass; resolve.py 779 LOC; 518 p-latest pushed. 515(#9) had a runbook merge CONFLICT with merged 516(#10) (both appended review-bot-ops.md) -> resolved keeping both sections (9d7c recovery + 7a41 triage), rebased+pushed. Submit attempts 517/515/509 409'd on stale bases (sub=True flag unreliable). Rebased 509 517 onto current main. Reliable current-tip candidates CI-ing: 513 519 (+509 517 515 now). Remaining: 509 513 515 517 518 519 -> then 562f.
